{{ define "title" }}{{ .Title }} | {{ .Site.Title }}{{ end }} {{ define "main" }} {{ partial "header_table.html" (dict "ctx" .) }} {{ partial "page_title.html" (dict "Title" .Title) }} {{ .Content }} {{ with .Site.Data.projects.highlight }} {{ partial "project_card_table.html" (dict "item" . "external" true) }} {{ end }} {{ $projects := .Site.Data.projects.entries }} {{ if $projects }}
{{ range $projects }} {{ partial "project_card_table.html" (dict "item" . "external" (hasPrefix .url "http")) }} {{ end }}
{{ end }} {{ partial "footer.html" . }} {{ end }}
